since_last: 46% of 84 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +1.59%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 46% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.72% · BTC -0.46% · Gold +0.75% · Nasdaq100 +1.26%. 46% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +1.59%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +1.59%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.21%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMAT is the standout at -5.58%
cards.body: Leaders: NET +3.62%, SAP +3.02%, NOW +2.89%, WDAY +2.69%, PANW +2.48%. Laggards: AMAT -5.58%, LRCX -5.35%, KLAC -5.06%, MU -4.90%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.12% at $160.23
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.12% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
